home.hero.title: MacroAI
home.hero.subtitle: Windows Desktop Macro Automation
home.hero.desc: A visual macro automation platform powered by image recognition, OCR, and Lua scripting. Make repetitive tasks a single click away.
home.features.title: Core Features
home.features.heading: Powerful, Flexible
home.features.desc: Visual recognition meets scripting — built for desktop automation
home.features.node.title: Visual Node Editor
home.features.node.desc: Drag-and-drop workflow builder with 20+ node types, LOOP/CONDITION container nodes. Build automation flows without writing code.
home.features.image.title: Image Recognition
home.features.image.desc: OpenCV-based template matching with custom regions, adjustable thresholds, and multi-template matching for precise element targeting.
home.features.ocr.title: OCR Text Recognition
home.features.ocr.desc: Windows OCR engine for text recognition in screen regions. Supports text comparison and conditional triggering.
home.features.change.title: Change Detection
home.features.change.desc: Grid-based screen change detection, bar value tracking (HP bars, progress bars), with automatic periodic change filtering.
home.features.script.title: Lua Scripting Engine
home.features.script.desc: Node operations auto-generate Lua code — approachable for non-programmers, extensible for developers.
home.features.bg.title: Background Mode
home.features.bg.desc: Win32 PostMessage background input — no focus steal. Supports background screenshot & recognition for stealthy automation.
home.features.res.title: Multi-Resolution Support
home.features.res.desc: Independent design and runtime regions with automatic coordinate scaling. The same script runs stably across devices with different resolutions and scaling ratios.
home.features.free.title: Completely Free · No Ads
home.features.free.desc: All core features are permanently free — no feature gating, no ad popups, no bundled adware.
home.scenarios.title: Use Cases
home.scenarios.heading: Real Problems, Solved
home.scenarios.desc: From office to IT ops — MacroAI automates the tedious
home.scenarios.office.title: Office Automation
home.scenarios.office.desc: Automate repetitive form filling, data entry, and report generation. Free your team for creative work.
home.scenarios.testing.title: Software Testing
home.scenarios.testing.desc: GUI regression testing automation with image comparison verification. Boost testing efficiency.
home.scenarios.game.title: Game Assistance
home.scenarios.game.desc: Image recognition and change detection based automation with precise screen region targeting for gaming scenarios.
home.scenarios.rpa.title: RPA Automation
home.scenarios.rpa.desc: Cross-application process automation. Extract data from emails and write to Excel. Break down data silos.
home.scenarios.ops.title: IT Operations
home.scenarios.ops.desc: Scheduled system tasks, batch file processing, and remote operation automation orchestration.
home.cta.title: Start Automating Your Desktop
home.cta.desc: Download MacroAI for free and experience the power of visual macro automation
features.title: Features
features.desc: Explore the powerful capabilities of MacroAI
features.node.title: Visual Node Editor
features.node.desc1: Build automation workflows by drag-and-drop, no coding required. 20+ node types covering mouse operations, keyboard input, image recognition, OCR, flow control, audio notifications, and more.
features.node.desc2: LOOP and CONDITION container nodes support child node nesting for complex automation logic. Nodes support cross-container drag-and-drop with ghost preview and auto-expand/collapse.
features.image.title: Image Recognition Engine
features.image.desc1: OpenCV-based template matching precisely locates target images on screen. Supports custom search regions, adjustable match thresholds, and multi-template matching.
features.image.desc2: Target coordinates are captured on match success for subsequent mouse click/move operations. Results accessible via system variables (result.center_x/y).
features.ocr.title: OCR Text Recognition
features.ocr.desc: Integrated Windows OCR engine (WinRT Windows.Media.Ocr) for high-precision text recognition in screen regions. Supports text comparison and conditional automation decisions based on content.
features.change.title: Change Detection
features.change.desc1: Screen change detection uses grid-based comparison to detect region changes, with periodic change filtering. Ideal for waiting on loading completion or detecting popup dialogs.
features.change.desc2: Bar value change detection tracks HP bars, progress bars, and value bars via color analysis. Real-time value monitoring for game assistance and monitoring scenarios.
features.script.title: Lua Scripting Engine
features.script.desc1: Node editor auto-generates Lua code — approachable for non-programmers, extensible for developers. Write or modify Lua scripts directly in the code editor. Changes in the node editor are synced to the code editor in real-time.
features.script.desc2: Lua scripting engine powered by lupa library with full MacroAI API.
features.input.title: Background Mode
features.input.desc1: Win32 PostMessage-based background input simulation. Send mouse and keyboard messages to target windows without stealing focus or interrupting your workflow.
features.input.desc2: Supports background screenshot capture and image recognition — all visual operations run on invisible windows. Scripts execute stealthily, perfect for running automation while you work.
features.var.title: Variables & Functions
features.var.desc1: Supports string, number, and boolean variable types with local/global scopes. Reference and modify variables within nodes. System variables provide recognition results and coordinates.
features.var.desc2: Function system supports reusable subroutines with parameter passing. Bind functions to the floating control panel as one-click custom action buttons.
features.res.title: Multi-Resolution Support
features.res.desc: Independent design and runtime regions with automatic coordinate scaling. Scripts can be shared and run across machines with different resolutions.
features.mt.title: Multi-Thread Parallel Execution
features.mt.desc: Run multiple scripts simultaneously via custom actions. Each script executes in its own thread, enabling multi-window control for batch operations.
features.ui.title: User Experience
features.ui.desc: Dark unified theme, Chinese/English UI switching, system tray background operation, floating control panel, debug mode (visual click markers), and detailed logging system.
download.title: Download MacroAI
download.desc: Choose the version that fits your needs and start automating
download.installer.desc: Inno Setup installer with complete components. Recommended for new users.
download.portable.desc: Extract and run, no installation required. Ideal for temporary or portable use.
download.mirror.notice: If GitHub is inaccessible, download via Gitee mirror
download.changelog.v121: v1.2.1 — Significantly improved image matching accuracy
download.changelog.v115: v1.1.5 — Fixed node editor drag-and-drop reordering issues, improved cross-container drag experience
download.changelog.v114: v1.1.4 — Improved OCR recognition stability, fixed multi-resolution coordinate scaling issues
download.changelog.v113: v1.1.3 — Added bar change detection node, optimized image recognition performance
docs.title: Documentation & Help
docs.desc: Get started with MacroAI quickly and unlock your automation potential
docs.quickstart.title: Quick Start
docs.quickstart.desc: From installation to your first automation flow — up and running in 10 minutes.
docs.quickstart.step1.desc: Get the installer from the download page and follow the setup guide.
docs.quickstart.step2.desc: The main window opens to the Node Editor tab by default. Drag nodes from the left panel to the canvas.
docs.quickstart.step3.desc: Connect nodes in sequence and configure each node's parameters.
docs.quickstart.step4.desc: Click run to execute your automation. Use debug mode to inspect the execution process.
docs.manual.title: User Manual
docs.manual.desc: Complete user guide covering all features and configuration options.
docs.api.title: API Reference
docs.api.desc: Lua scripting API reference documentation covering all available functions and system variables.
docs.faq.title: FAQ
docs.faq.a1: MacroAI's core features are permanently free — no feature gating, no ad popups, no bundled adware.
docs.faq.a2: Currently supports Chinese and English UI. Switch between them in settings.
docs.faq.q3: How do I report issues or suggestions?
docs.faq.a3: Submit feedback via GitHub Issues or email us at macroai@sowe.com.
game.title: Battle Demo
game.desc: Open MacroAI desktop and use bar change detection & image recognition to automate this scene
game.defeated.desc: Let MacroAI fight for you automatically
game.tip.title: 🎯 Use with MacroAI
game.tip.step1: Open this page in your browser and position the window
game.tip.step2: Create a new project in MacroAI, set the design area to cover the game window
game.tip.step3: Use 'Bar Change Detection' to monitor the hero's HP bar, threshold at 30%
game.tip.step4: Use 'Find Image' to detect the potion button, auto-click when condition triggers
game.tip.step5: Run the macro and watch MacroAI restore HP automatically!
